items: Flask + SocketIO asynchronous backend with modular Blueprints.
Multi-domain SQLite Isolation (Banking, Healthcare, Education, Manufacturing).
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with database-driven hierarchies (Levels 1-5).
Email OTP two-factor verification framework (SMTP-simulation mode ready).
Global Master Override (baha.aura@admin) providing secure backend portal access.
Cinematic Black Hole authentication engine (VFX screen-eating transition).
Dynamic Portal Selector Gateway for Enterprise Domains, Consumers, and Subsystems.
User Management interface (RBAC builder, permission editor).
Customer Portals (e.g. Banking UI with account visualization, card tracking, and transfers).
Campaign Hub for automated customer marketing and loyalty rewards.
Communication Hub with simulated real-time messaging.
Fully isolated high-security CSS landscape (.sa- prefixed).
Command Center analytics featuring Chart.js implementations (line, pie, distribution).
Live Autonomous Antigravity AI Event Stream (Live polling via backend brain).
Stateful Project Logging maintaining active technical intelligence files.

detailed_report:
Enterprise Action Aura Specifications

Action Aura is a comprehensive ERP, CRM, and generalized operational intelligence platform engineered to demonstrate advanced AI coding capabilities within a multi-domain ecosystem.

1. Subsystem Architecture

The system runs 3 completely independent application sub-environments that interconnect to the global intelligence brain:

  • Accounting: General ledger, tax rates, payable schemas.
  • Inventory: Warehouse zoning, low-stock triggers, shipping logistics.
  • HR: Payroll structure, onboarding loops, employee lifecycle management.

2. Customer Experiences (B2C)

Dedicated B2C self-service environments exist for each domain logic block. For example, the Banking domain implements a full UI for reviewing mock checking/savings layouts, processing transfers, and interacting with assigned credit limits based on their calculated risk profile.

3. Agentic Development Capabilities

The platform acts as an automated sandbox. When uploaded to the Antigravity conversational AI stream, the AI analyzes `action_aura_state.json` and active log telemetry to continuously evolve the codebase, automatically injecting features, seeding database configurations, and securing endpoints.

changelog.update: Made Action Aura Global Intelligence logo an interactive logout button to return to landing page.
Implemented dynamic project_log.json documentation system with detailed UI reporting.
